markdown:
The current corpus contains **5 papers**:

1. **Language Models are Few-Shot Learners** — Tom B. Brown et al., 2020 (NeurIPS; arXiv:2005.14165)
2. **Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners** — Alec Radford et al., 2019 (OpenAI technical report)
3. **BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding** — Jacob Devlin, Ming-Wei Chang et al., 2018 (NAACL; arXiv:1810.04805)
4. **Attention Is All You Need** — Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer et al., 2017 (NeurIPS; arXiv:1706.03762)
5. **Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization** — Diederik P. Kingma, Jimmy Ba, 2014 (ICLR; arXiv:1412.6980)
